/usr/bin/ar qc libblake3_static.a CMakeFiles/blake3_static.dir/submodules/blake3/c/blake3.c.o CMakeFiles/blake3_static.dir/submodules/blake3/c/blake3_dispatch.c.o CMakeFiles/blake3_static.dir/submodules/blake3/c/blake3_portable.c.o CMakeFiles/blake3_static.dir/submodules/blake3/c/blake3_sse2.c.o CMakeFiles/blake3_static.dir/submodules/blake3/c/blake3_sse41.c.o CMakeFiles/blake3_static.dir/submodules/blake3/c/blake3_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/blake3_static.dir/submodules/blake3/c/blake3_avx512.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libblake3_static.a
